overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia riding a horse through a dense coniferous forest. The camera follows from behind as the horse trots along a winding dirt path past large rock outcrops and stone walls under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail through coniferous woodland

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding the horse at a steady trot along the winding dirt path toward the rock formation ahead

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation rising above the tree line directly ahead on the path
dense pine and spruce trees covering the hillside in the distance
narrow winding dirt path with patches of grass and gravel
leafless dead tree trunk standing among the green foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt on horseback approaching a large rock outcrop in a dense coniferous forest. The trail is a narrow dirt path winding through lush green vegetation under a bright partly cloudy sky. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the horse maintains a steady trot toward the rock formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path alongside stone wall

events.description: horse begins turning left to follow the path alongside the stone wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt guiding the horse left as the trail curves alongside a stone wall, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running parallel to the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The horse turns left to follow the winding trail alongside a stone wall that appears on the left. The large rock outcrop passes behind on the right as the path narrows. The forest canopy creates partial shade overhead while the horse continues along the dirt path bordered by the stone wall and dense trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense coniferous forest as a rider on horseback navigates a winding trail past natural and man-made landmarks. It begins with the camera trailing smoothly behind Geralt as he trots along a narrow dirt path toward a large rock outcrop under a bright, partly cloudy sky. As the horse reaches the formation, the path curves left, causing the rock outcrop to recede behind on the right. The scene then shifts as a stone wall emerges on the left, bordering the narrowing trail. Finally, the camera follows the horse deeper into the woods, where the open brightness gives way to partial shade cast by the overarching forest canopy.
